name: COCHING AI — 가이드처방 생성기 v2.2 Claude Local

parameters.jsCode:
// ===== 생성 대상 선정 (43 제형 × 5 피부 = 215 조합) =====
const productTypes = [
  {key:'수분크림',cat:'기초화장',hints:'glycerin,hyaluronic acid,ceramide,squalane,보습'},
  {key:'영양크림',cat:'기초화장',hints:'shea butter,jojoba oil,vitamin e,retinol,영양'},
  {key:'에센스',cat:'기초화장',hints:'niacinamide,peptide,vitamin c,ferment,세럼'},
  {key:'토너',cat:'기초화장',hints:'witch hazel,glycolic acid,AHA,BHA,화장수'},
  {key:'로션',cat:'기초화장',hints:'glycerin,dimethicone,cetyl alcohol,로션,유연'},
  {key:'아이크림',cat:'기초화장',hints:'caffeine,peptide,retinol,vitamin k,아이,주름'},
  {key:'마사지크림',cat:'기초화장',hints:'mineral oil,beeswax,tocopherol,마사지'},
  {key:'팩마스크',cat:'기초화장',hints:'kaolin,bentonite,charcoal,hydrogel,팩,마스크'},
  {key:'바디로션',cat:'기초화장',hints:'shea butter,glycerin,mineral oil,바디,보습'},
  {key:'바디크림',cat:'기초화장',hints:'cocoa butter,beeswax,lanolin,바디,크림'},
  {key:'핸드크림',cat:'기초화장',hints:'glycerin,urea,allantoin,핸드,손'},
  {key:'클렌징크림',cat:'기초화장',hints:'mineral oil,beeswax,emulsifier,클렌징'},
  {key:'폼클렌저',cat:'세정',hints:'sodium laureth sulfate,cocamidopropyl betaine,foam,세정'},
  {key:'바디워시',cat:'세정',hints:'sodium laureth sulfate,cocamidopropyl,바디워시'},
  {key:'클렌징오일',cat:'세정',hints:'mineral oil,isopropyl myristate,polysorbate,클렌징오일'},
  {key:'클렌징워터',cat:'세정',hints:'micelle,glycerin,panthenol,클렌징워터'},
  {key:'액체비누',cat:'세정',hints:'potassium hydroxide,coconut oil,soap,비누'},
  {key:'선크림',cat:'선케어',hints:'titanium dioxide,zinc oxide,UV filter,SPF,자외선'},
  {key:'선로션',cat:'선케어',hints:'titanium dioxide,octinoxate,avobenzone,선로션'},
  {key:'선스프레이',cat:'선케어',hints:'homosalate,octisalate,alcohol,선스프레이'},
  {key:'선스틱',cat:'선케어',hints:'zinc oxide,beeswax,carnauba wax,선스틱'},
  {key:'파운데이션',cat:'색조',hints:'iron oxide,silicone,dimethicone,titanium dioxide,파운데이션'},
  {key:'메이크업베이스',cat:'색조',hints:'silicone,dimethicone,primer,베이스'},
  {key:'페이스파우더',cat:'색조',hints:'talc,mica,silica,iron oxide,파우더'},
  {key:'립스틱',cat:'색조',hints:'castor oil,beeswax,carnauba wax,iron oxide,립스틱'},
  {key:'립글로스',cat:'색조',hints:'polybutene,mineral oil,tocopherol,립글로스'},
  {key:'아이섀도',cat:'색조',hints:'mica,talc,iron oxide,titanium dioxide,아이섀도'},
  {key:'마스카라',cat:'색조',hints:'beeswax,carnauba wax,iron oxide,마스카라'},
  {key:'블러셔',cat:'색조',hints:'talc,mica,iron oxide,zinc stearate,블러셔,볼연지'},
  {key:'샴푸',cat:'두발',hints:'sodium laureth sulfate,cocamidopropyl betaine,샴푸'},
  {key:'컨디셔너',cat:'두발',hints:'cetrimonium chloride,behentrimonium,컨디셔너,린스'},
  {key:'헤어트리트먼트',cat:'두발',hints:'keratin,argan oil,hydrolyzed protein,트리트먼트'},
  {key:'헤어에센스',cat:'두발',hints:'dimethicone,cyclomethicone,argan oil,헤어에센스'},
  {key:'헤어왁스',cat:'두발',hints:'beeswax,peg,pvp,헤어왁스,젤'},
  {key:'헤어오일',cat:'두발',hints:'argan oil,jojoba oil,camellia oil,헤어오일'},
  {key:'헤어토닉',cat:'두발',hints:'menthol,salicylic acid,biotin,헤어토닉,두피'},
  {key:'향수',cat:'방향',hints:'alcohol denat,fragrance,linalool,limonene,향수'},
  {key:'데오도란트',cat:'체취방지',hints:'aluminum chlorohydrate,triclosan,데오도란트'},
  {key:'면도크림',cat:'면도',hints:'stearic acid,triethanolamine,glycerin,면도'},
  {key:'네일폴리시',cat:'손발톱',hints:'nitrocellulose,tosylamide,acetyl tributyl citrate,네일'},
  {key:'베이비로션',cat:'영유아',hints:'glycerin,allantoin,panthenol,베이비,아기'},
  {key:'베이비오일',cat:'영유아',hints:'mineral oil,tocopherol,chamomile,베이비오일'},
  {key:'치약',cat:'구강',hints:'sodium fluoride,calcium carbonate,sorbitol,치약'}
];
const skinTypes = [
  {key:'지성',eng:'oily'},{key:'건성',eng:'dry'},{key:'복합성',eng:'combination'},
  {key:'민감성',eng:'sensitive'},{key:'중성',eng:'normal'}
];
const total = productTypes.length * skinTypes.length;
const idx = Math.floor(Date.now() / 14400000) % total;
const pIdx = Math.floor(idx / skinTypes.length);
const sIdx = idx % skinTypes.length;
const p = productTypes[pIdx];
const s = skinTypes[sIdx];
return [{json:{
  product_type_kr: p.key, category: p.cat,
  skin_type_kr: s.key, skin_type_eng: s.eng,
  combo_key: p.key+'_'+s.key, ingredient_hints: p.hints,
  total_combos: total, current_index: idx,
  run_id: 'guide_'+Date.now(), timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
}}];

parameters.query: SELECT id, combo_key, guide_data, formula_name FROM guide_cache WHERE combo_key = '{{ $json.combo_key }}' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT inci_name, restriction, max_concentration, source FROM regulation_cache WHERE restriction IS NOT NULL AND restriction != '' ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 30

SELECT brand_name, product_name, full_ingredients FROM product_master WHERE LOWER(category) LIKE LOWER('%{{ $('🔄 원료 SQL 생성').first().json.product_type_kr }}%') OR LOWER(product_type) LIKE LOWER('%{{ $('🔄 원료 SQL 생성').first().json.product_type_kr }}%') ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 3

INSERT INTO guide_cache (combo_key,product_type,skin_type,formula_name,guide_data,total_wt_percent,wt_valid,estimated_ph,estimated_viscosity,source,created_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.combo_key }}','{{ $json.product_type_kr }}','{{ $json.skin_type_kr }}','{{ $json.formula_name }}','{{ $json.guide_data_escaped }}'::jsonb,{{ $json.total_wt_percent }},{{ $json.wt_valid }},{{ $json.estimated_ph || 'NULL' }},{{ $json.estimated_viscosity || 'NULL' }},'claude_local',NOW()) ON CONFLICT (combo_key) DO UPDATE SET guide_data=EXCLUDED.guide_data,formula_name=EXCLUDED.formula_name,total_wt_percent=EXCLUDED.total_wt_percent,wt_valid=EXCLUDED.wt_valid,estimated_ph=EXCLUDED.estimated_ph,estimated_viscosity=EXCLUDED.estimated_viscosity,updated_at=NOW(),version=guide_cache.version+1
